mapper.select: DECLARE @RET_CODE INT; EXEC @RET_CODE = UP_DOI_MAT_AMT #{yyyymm}, #{site}, N'ACTUAL'
exec DOI_AnnualReportBySite @YYYY=#{yyyy}, @SITE=#{site};

WITH dist_cost AS (
SELECT '제조경비' AS GUBUN, FROM_DEPT_CODE, FROM_DEPT_NAME, FROM_ACCT_CODE, FROM_ACCT_NAME, EXPEN_SEL, EXPEN_SEL_NAME, ACCT_AMT, 1 AS seq FROM DOI_MFG_EXP WHERE yyyymm = #{yyyymm} AND site = #{site}
UNION ALL
SELECT '연구개발부서' AS GUBUN, FROM_DEPT_CODE, FROM_DEPT_NAME, FROM_ACCT_CODE, FROM_ACCT_NAME, EXPEN_SEL, EXPEN_SEL_NAME, ACCT_AMT, 2 AS seq FROM DOI_RND WHERE yyyymm = #{yyyymm} AND site = #{site} AND cost_type = '제조비용'
UNION ALL
SELECT '카세트팀' AS GUBUN, FROM_DEPT_CODE, FROM_DEPT_NAME, FROM_ACCT_CODE, FROM_ACCT_NAME, EXPEN_SEL, EXPEN_SEL_NAME, ACCT_AMT, 3 AS seq FROM DOI_CASET WHERE yyyymm = #{yyyymm} AND site = #{site}
UNION ALL
SELECT '판매관리비' AS GUBUN, FROM_DEPT_CODE, FROM_DEPT_NAME, FROM_ACCT_CODE, FROM_ACCT_NAME, EXPEN_SEL, EXPEN_SEL_NAME, ACCT_AMT, 4 AS seq FROM DOI_SGA WHERE yyyymm = #{yyyymm} AND site = #{site}
UNION ALL
SELECT '연구개발부서(비제조)' AS GUBUN, FROM_DEPT_CODE, FROM_DEPT_NAME, FROM_ACCT_CODE, FROM_ACCT_NAME, EXPEN_SEL, EXPEN_SEL_NAME, ACCT_AMT, 5 AS seq FROM DOI_RND WHERE yyyymm = #{yyyymm} AND site = #{site} AND cost_type != '제조비용' ) SELECT * FROM dist_cost WHERE 1=1
AND seq IN (1, 2, 3)
AND seq IN (4, 5)
AND seq = CAST(#{seq} AS INT)
ORDER BY seq
